title: Unify bee repo .codex/hooks.json on .bee/bin/hooks/ (drop top-level hooks/ ref)
action: Per author decision: bee own-repo codex .codex/hooks.json (catalog REPO target) should reference .bee/bin/hooks/ (the committed vendored/onboarded location, tracked in git) instead of top-level hooks/, for both the POSIX command and commandWindows — one hook path everywhere. catalog.mjs repoCommand (line 80) + commandWindowsFor REPO branch (line 97). Update test_hook_contracts.mjs repo-transport + commandWindows assertions and test_conformance.mjs hard-coded hooks/ fixtures. Re-render .codex/hooks.json + plugin trees + release manifest. Full verify green.

truths: catalog REPO target emits .bee/bin/hooks/<file> for both `command` (exec node "$r"/.bee/bin/hooks/<file> --source=repo) and `commandWindows` (node .bee/bin/hooks/<file> --source=repo).
.bee/bin/hooks/ is committed in bee repo (10 files tracked), so a fresh clone resolves the path without onboarding.
Host projection unchanged (already .bee/bin/hooks/); claude projections unchanged; the 13 repo-command / commandWindows contract count unchanged.
Full verify suite green; rendered .codex/hooks.json + plugin trees match.
prohibitions: Do NOT change claude or codex-plugin projections.
Do NOT weaken the repo-transport or commandWindows contract tests — update them to assert .bee/bin/hooks/.

verify: node hooks/test_hook_contracts.mjs && node scripts/test_conformance.mjs && node skills/bee-hive/scripts/test_plugin_distribution.mjs && node scripts/test_skill_render.mjs

trace.verification_evidence: {"red_failure_evidence":"Before: bee own-repo .codex/hooks.json (catalog REPO target) referenced top-level hooks/ for both command (exec node \"$r\"/hooks/<file>) and commandWindows (node hooks/<file>) — inconsistent with the host projection (.bee/bin/hooks/) and, per author, the wrong runtime location: hooks are the onboarded/vendored .bee/bin/hooks/ everywhere, top-level hooks/ is only the plugin source.","green_evidence":"After: catalog repoCommand + commandWindowsFor REPO branch emit .bee/bin/hooks/<file> for both fields. .codex/hooks.json regenerated: 26 occurrences of .bee/bin/hooks/ (13 entries x2), 0 top-level hooks/ references. .bee/bin/hooks/ is git-tracked (10 files committed) so fresh clones resolve it. Repo-transport + commandWindows contract tests tightened to require .bee/bin/hooks/ explicitly; route fixture staged at .bee/bin/hooks/. Orchestrator independent full verify: EXIT=0."}
trace.verify_output: ORCH_VERIFY2_EXIT=0 (orchestrator independent re-run). .codex/hooks.json: 26 occurrences .bee/bin/hooks/, 0 top-level hooks/ refs.
